rows.label: qev012202_MSG0001
rows.name:
We've arrived! 
Thank goodness, the unit is still here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'll get to repairing it right away. 
Senpai, please wait a moment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0003
rows.name:
Watching your junior ride a Doll 
might be quite a moving experience, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0004
rows.name: Alright, commencing work~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0008
rows.name: Repairs complete![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0009
rows.name:
How's that? Super fast, right? 
Back when I worked as technical staff, 
I was famous for my speed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0010
rows.name: Yup! All parts operating normally, visibility is good too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0011
rows.name:
Thank you, Senpai! 
Thanks to you, the repairs are done and I can 
continue my adventure![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_JNK0010
rows.name: See her off

rows.label: qev012202_SEL0011
rows.name: Let her go in silence.

rows.label: qev012202_JNK0020
rows.name: Call out

rows.label: qev012202_SEL0021
rows.name: Demand a reward.

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0012
rows.name: Output at maximum! Gooooo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0013
rows.name: Ugh... I got shot again...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0014
rows.name:
Did I do something to make them 
hold a grudge against me...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0015
rows.name:
But Senpai! 
This time, I didn't just get shot for nothing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0016
rows.name:
I confirmed where the shots came from. 
There's a fort up ahead, and they're 
shooting from a turret there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0017
rows.name:
If we don't do something about that fort, 
I can't proceed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0018
rows.name:
I think we need to formulate a strategy 
and aim to capture the fort...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0019
rows.name: But unfortunately, my Doll has been broken again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0020
rows.name: But rejoice![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0021
rows.name:
The damage is minor, and we still have leftover materials, 
so I can repair it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0022
rows.name:
I'll start the repairs right away, 
so Senpai, please handle capturing the fort![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0023
rows.name: Let's split up and overcome this adversity together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0024
rows.name: Do your best![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0025
rows.name: What happened!? Did you get beat!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0026
rows.name: ...Phew. Don't scare me like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0027
rows.name:
The repairs are going smoothly, 
but it's going to take just a little longer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012202_MSG0028
rows.name:
I'm doing my best too, 
so you do your best as well, Senpai![ST:wait ]
